H2: Gift Label FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Gift Labels

Create Personalized Gift Labels for Special Occasions

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Design Method Upload Print-Ready File Use Online Designer Professional Design Service Material Options Vinyl Premium Vinyl Clear Cut Options Die-Cut Kiss-Cut Sizes Custom Dimensions Available Quantities Starting at 25 Labels Production Time 1 Day Priority 2 Day Express 3 Day Standard 5 Day Saver Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Gift Labels for Every Occasion

Make your gift-giving memorable with personalized gift labels from Decals.com. Our custom gift labels are perfect for birthdays, holidays, weddings, baby showers, and any special occasion where you want to add a personal touch. Each gift label is printed on high-quality vinyl material that adheres securely to gift boxes, bags, envelopes, and various surfaces. See also [rectangle label sheets](https://www.decals.com/labels/label-sheets/rectangle-label-sheets).

Choose from multiple design options including our easy-to-use online designer, professional file upload, or custom design services. Gift labels are available in both die-cut and kiss-cut options, allowing you to select the perfect finishing style for your project. With production times ranging from 1 to 5 business days and quantities starting at just 25 pieces, our gift labels offer the flexibility you need for both small personal projects and larger event requirements.

Whether you're creating gift labels for a family celebration, corporate event, or retail packaging, our durable vinyl construction ensures your personalized message stays vibrant and professional-looking. Order your custom gift labels today and transform ordinary packages into extraordinary gifts that recipients will remember.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Custom Gift Labels

Ordering personalized gift labels is simple with our streamlined three-step process designed to get your labels into production quickly and efficiently.

Design Process

Start by selecting your preferred design method for your gift labels. Use our intuitive online designer to create custom gift labels from scratch by uploading images, adding text, and choosing from our extensive clipart library. Alternatively, upload your own print-ready file in EPS, PDF, JPG, TIFF, or PNG format for professional results. Our design team can also create custom gift labels for you through our professional design services.

Once your design is complete and you've selected your specifications, add the gift labels to your cart and choose your preferred shipping method. A digital proof will be automatically emailed to you for review before production begins.

Payment

All custom gift labels require full payment before entering production. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted and must be received before your gift label order begins production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your gift label order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This proprietary system allows you to monitor your custom gift labels through every stage of our production process, from order placement to final delivery. Simply click the tracking link in your email to get real-time updates on your gift label order status.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Gift Label Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule for gift labels ranges from one to five business days, giving you complete control over your project timeline. Production begins once your proof is approved and payment is received.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Perfect for urgent gift label needs with our fastest turnaround option. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day service may be available in select cases - contact customer service for availability. Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.

2 Business Days Express Production

Ideal when you need gift labels quickly but have a little extra time. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will start production the next business day. Emergency rush options may be available upon request. Remember to factor in shipping time for total delivery expectations.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production timeline for gift labels, offering the perfect balance of speed and value. This option is free with most orders and provides ample time for quality production. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Choose this economical option when you're planning ahead for your gift labels. The extended timeline allows for cost savings while maintaining our high quality standards. Production starts the business day following approval for orders approved after 5:00 PM CST.

Important: Production time begins when file upload is complete. If your gift label order requires prepress review or proof approval, the production timeline starts from approval confirmation, not initial order placement.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut vs Kiss-Cut Gift Label Options

Understanding the difference between die-cut and kiss-cut gift labels will help you choose the best option for your project. Both cutting methods offer distinct advantages depending on your application needs.

Die-Cut Gift Labels

Die-cut gift labels are precision-cut through both the vinyl label material and paper backing, creating individually separated labels with no excess material. Think of this process like using a cookie cutter - each gift label is perfectly contoured to your design shape with clean, professional edges.

This cutting method works exceptionally well for gift labels with custom shapes, logos, or decorative borders. Die-cut gift labels offer a premium appearance and are ideal when you want each label to stand alone without any background material. Back slit (crack and peel) functionality is available on standard and permanent material options for easy removal.

Kiss-Cut Gift Labels

Kiss-cut gift labels are cut only through the vinyl layer, leaving the paper backing intact around each label. This creates a border of backing material that makes individual gift labels easy to peel and apply, especially useful when working with smaller labels or intricate designs.

The paper backing border provides a convenient grip area for handling and application, making kiss-cut gift labels particularly practical for high-volume applications or when multiple people will be applying the labels. This option is excellent for traditional rectangular or circular gift label shapes.

For detailed technical information about cut options, visit our comprehensive Die-cut vs Kiss-cut guide to make the best choice for your gift label project.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Gift Label Artwork & File Requirements

Proper file preparation ensures your custom gift labels print with maximum quality and accuracy. Follow these specifications for optimal results.

Preferred File Types

For the highest quality gift label printing, submit files in these vector formats with a maximum file size of 100 MB:

  • Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated PostScript)
  • PDF (Adobe PDF with embedded fonts)

When submitting vector files, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution issues during gift label production.

Additional File Formats

Raster image files are also accepted for gift label printing:

  • JPG (High Resolution JPEG)
  • TIFF (High Resolution TIFF)
  • PNG (High Resolution PNG with transparent backgrounds)

File Setup Guidelines

Follow these essential setup requirements for professional gift label results:

  • Set up artwork proportionate to your exact gift label size
  • Convert all text elements to outlines
  • Include bleed only when necessary for full-coverage designs
  • Never flatten or merge layers in PSD files
  • Clearly indicate cut lines for all gift label designs

Resolution Requirements

Raster images must meet minimum resolution standards:

  • 100% scale (full size) at 100 DPI minimum
  • 50% scale at 200 DPI minimum

Higher resolution ensures sharp, professional-looking gift labels without pixelation or quality degradation during printing.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Gift Label Shipping & Delivery

We offer reliable shipping options for gift labels to meet your timeline and budget requirements. Shipping time is separate from production time, so factor both into your total delivery expectations.

Shipping Methods

Choose from several carrier options for your gift label delivery:

  • Standard Ground: Cost-effective delivery within 3-7 business days via UPS or FedEx
  • Expedited Shipping: Faster delivery options including 2-day and overnight service
  • Economy Shipping: Budget-friendly option with extended delivery times

Delivery Time Expectations

Your total delivery time for gift labels includes production time plus shipping time. For example, if you select 2-day express production with standard ground shipping, expect 5-9 total business days from approval to delivery.

All gift label orders include tracking information so you can monitor your shipment progress. Tracking details are automatically emailed once your order ships from our facility.

Important Shipping Notes

Economy shipping options may have limited tracking capability and extended delivery windows. For time-sensitive gift label orders, we recommend expedited shipping methods to ensure reliable delivery timing.

International shipping is available for gift labels with customs documentation provided. Contact customer service for international delivery estimates and requirements specific to your destination.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Gift Label Installation & Application

Proper application ensures your gift labels adhere securely and look professional on any surface. Follow these steps for best results.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the application surface thoroughly before applying gift labels. Remove dust, oils, and residue using isopropyl alcohol or a mild detergent solution. Allow the surface to dry completely before proceeding. Gift labels adhere best to smooth, non-porous surfaces like gift boxes, plastic bags, glass, and metal containers.

Applying Gift Labels

For die-cut gift labels, carefully peel each label from its backing and position it on your desired surface. Press from the center outward to eliminate air bubbles and ensure full contact. For kiss-cut gift labels, use the paper backing border as a handling area - peel the label from one corner and apply gradually to prevent wrinkles.

Work slowly and deliberately, especially with larger gift labels or intricate designs. Once positioned, the strong adhesive forms a permanent bond that's difficult to reposition without potential damage.

Application Tips

Apply gift labels at room temperature for optimal adhesive performance. Avoid application in extremely cold conditions, as this can affect initial adhesion strength. For curved surfaces like bottles or containers, work from the center outward and press firmly along the edges.

If air bubbles appear under your gift labels, use a small needle to create a tiny hole and gently press out the trapped air. The adhesive will self-seal minor punctures while eliminating the bubble.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Gift Labels?

Gift labels are custom-printed adhesive labels designed to personalize and identify gifts for special occasions. Made from durable vinyl material, these labels feature custom text, graphics, or designs that transform ordinary packages into memorable presentations. Gift labels are commonly used for birthdays, holidays, weddings, baby showers, and corporate events where personalized identification or branding is desired. They apply easily to gift boxes, bags, envelopes, and various packaging materials, creating an instant upgrade to any gift presentation.

Design Your Perfect Gift Labels Today

Transform your gift-giving with custom gift labels that reflect your personal style and attention to detail. Our high-quality vinyl construction and professional printing ensure every label looks crisp and vibrant, while our flexible production options accommodate both last-minute needs and planned celebrations.

Whether you're planning a intimate family gathering or organizing a large corporate event, our gift labels provide the perfect finishing touch for memorable gift presentations. With rounded corner labels and clear stickers also available, you have endless options to customize your gift packaging approach.

Ready to create gift labels that make every present special? Start designing your custom gift labels now and discover why thousands of customers trust Decals.com for their personalized labeling needs.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Gift Label FAQs

What materials work best for gift labels?

Gift labels are printed on high-quality vinyl material that provides excellent durability and adhesion to most surfaces. Our standard vinyl works well for indoor applications and short-term outdoor use, while premium vinyl options offer enhanced weather resistance for longer-lasting applications on various gift packaging materials.

How small can I make custom gift labels?

Gift labels can be produced in virtually any size from small 0.5-inch circles for gift tags to large 12-inch squares for gift boxes. Our precision cutting equipment handles intricate details even on smaller gift labels, ensuring text and graphics remain crisp and readable at any size.

Can I order different designs in one gift label order?

Yes, you can include multiple gift label designs in a single order through our variable data printing service. This allows you to create personalized gift labels with different names, messages, or graphics while maintaining consistent sizing and material specifications throughout your order.

Do gift labels work on textured surfaces?

Gift labels adhere best to smooth, clean surfaces like gift boxes, plastic bags, and glass containers. While they may stick to lightly textured surfaces, optimal adhesion and appearance occur on non-porous, flat surfaces where the adhesive can make full contact with the material.

What's the difference between die-cut and kiss-cut gift labels?

Die-cut gift labels are individually separated with no backing material around each label, creating a premium custom-shaped appearance. Kiss-cut gift labels remain on a backing sheet with paper borders around each label, making them easier to handle and apply, especially for smaller sizes or high-volume applications.

Can I get a proof before my gift labels are printed?

Yes, digital proofs are automatically provided for all custom gift label orders. Once you complete your order and upload your artwork, you'll receive a proof via email showing exactly how your gift labels will appear when printed. Production begins only after you approve the proof and payment is processed.
